system.description: Series of alchemical compounds contained in vials that Geppetto hides under his tacky yellow wig. When thrown, vials produce random effects: 1-2 Explosive (1 Wound to everyone within thirty feet, thick black smoke engulfs area), 3-4 Stench (nauseating odor giving 1 Penalty to all actions for rest of Scene), 5-6 Air Bomb (all subjects within thirty feet knocked back and fall to ground, 1 Wound if hit obstacle). Geppetto is immune to his own concoctions' effects.
